findings: RCA produced before fixing at docs/defects/KEEL-101-rca.md: root cause is the v3.9.0 engine-path migration (commit 1685e2d) swept agent instruction files to 'node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs' but missed the resume instruction duplicated as hard-coded text in two runtime message strings (staleCheck in keel-watch.cjs, notifyHalt in keel-state.cjs).

TDD Red verified: scripts/test-halt-message-paths.cjs run BEFORE the fix exited 1 with both AC failure lines ('AC-1: ... staleCheck HALTED message does not contain "node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs resume"' and 'AC-2: ... notifyHalt Slack text does not contain ...').
AC-1 fixed and verified: scripts/keel-watch.cjs staleCheck() HALTED warning now instructs 'node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs resume <story> --phase <N> --notes "..."'; regression test passes (exit 0).
AC-2 fixed and verified: scripts/keel-state.cjs notifyHalt() Slack text now instructs 'node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs resume <story> --phase <N> --notes "..."'; regression test passes (exit 0).
Revert-check executed via engine (test staged, fixes unstaged); exact verdict: 'PASS: regression test fails without the fix and passes with it — the test proves the fix.' (exit 0).
Retest: full engine suite 'node scripts/test-keel-state.cjs' passed 11/11 (exit 0) with the fixes applied — no regression in engine behavior.
Lessons writeback done: .keel/memory/lessons.md created with L-1 (2026-07-09, KEEL-101) recording the hard-coded-path-in-runtime-messages pattern and prevention rule.

Self code review of git diff: message-text-only change in two strings, no control-flow or behavioral change, matching the BA-defined scope; no patch-pattern (no swallowed errors, timeouts, or special-casing).
decisions: Defect express lane: phases 2-3 skipped per manifest scope 'defect'; implemented directly from 01-business-analyst.json ACs.

Regression test written as a zero-dependency static source assertion (scripts/test-halt-message-paths.cjs) reading both source files, because the defect is message text; runner is node (Node project), not phpunit.
Revert-check protocol followed exactly: regression test staged via git add, both fixes left as unstaged working-tree changes so the engine could stash-revert them.
Fixes left uncommitted per phase instructions; commit is a later-phase/human decision.
